name: Emo Quest XD
short_description: A colorful dark retro-styled RPG adventure about Soul, Love and Emotion. Never lose faith in yourself!
detailed_description:
A Quest about Soul, Love and Emotion, inspired by retro RPG style!

You're a boy with dark powers, who was playing games and finds out there are monsters outside! So you decide to go out and defeat them to level up!

Never lose faith in yourself!


(Game contains some flashing lights, be advised)


FEATURES:

- Diversity of locations! Explore forests, swamps, castles, caves, graveyards and more!

- Emotive and sometimes out of place story with unique elements...

- Traditional RPG battle system while also having the option to finish peacefully only if you weaken the monster and try to give it a Flower!

- Mix of puzzles sections with random encounters sections!

- 2 different OST modes, a modern one and an 8-bit styled one.

- 5 different Color Palettes to choose from! Twilight, EX, Groovy, Original and ULTRA EX!

- Collect song genres and give'em a Heart to "equip" them and gain its effect. For example, if you have Power Metal song equipped you gain immunity to SLEEP effect while also gaining 5 points of Speed!
